errors.quotaExhausted: We've hit our daily limit. Please try again in a few minutes.

errors.permissionDenied: The assistant is not configured correctly. Please contact support.
errors.injectionRejected: Sorry, I can't process that request. Try rephrasing your question.
errors.networkFailure: Couldn't reach the assistant. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Session expired or the assistant hit an unexpected issue. Please try again.
